protein_name: Regulates transcription in association with TATA binding protein (TBP). Removes TBP from the TATA box in an ATP-dependent manner. Belongs to the SNF2/RAD54 helicase family. 2 alternatively spliced human isoforms have been reported. Note: This description may include information from UniProtKB.

raw_fields.Protein type: EC 3.6.1.-; EC 3.6.4.-; Helicase; Transcription initiation complex
raw_fields.Molecular Function: ATP binding; ATP hydrolysis activity; ATP-dependent activity, acting on DNA; DNA binding; helicase activity; hydrolase activity; nucleotide binding; TBP-class protein binding; transcription coregulator activity
raw_fields.Biological Process: negative regulation of chromatin binding; negative regulation of DNA-templated transcription
raw_fields.Alt.
